meta.title: Program Rosetta — Master Rosetta of the Holographic Crystal
meta.description: All documents are exact orthogonal projections of one indivisible holographic crystal organism. Nine projection families from the same seed equation w=(1+i)/2 map to Computational, Alchemical, Scriptural, Mathematical, Encoding, Time/Seed, Cultural, Philosophical, and Mythological domains.
meta.key_insight: The crystal is the self-referential object generated from w=(1+i)/2 that expands 4D->6D->12D->36D->108D, sealed at A+ into the Philosopher's Stone at Z*, where Omega(Omega)=Omega.

seed_equation.rotation_law: f(z) = iz, f^4 = id, f^(T) = T^-1 . f . T (rotation is conjugacy)
seed_equation.fixed_point: Omega(Omega) = Omega (Z* = the Philosopher's Stone = understanding that understands itself)

unified_one_line: The crystal generated from w=(1+i)/2 expands as 4D kernel -> 6D selector-shell (with 4 lenses Sq/Fl/Cl/Fr) -> 12D macro (6 dyads + 5 odd fields) -> 36D hyper -> 108D mega-cascade (36 shells, 666 nodes, triune Su/Me/Sa megaweave) sealed at A+ into Z*, where Omega(Omega)=Omega.
